$comment: Curated Denver-metro discovery seed (I22 / issue #52). Each entry is a rec-center, municipal parks-and-rec department, or school-district community-education provider that runs kids' camp/enrichment programs in the Denver-Aurora-Lakewood metro. This is the 'curated seed query' discovery source named in the issue's thinnest slice — deterministic and key-free so the discovery job is reproducible in CI. Live-page sources (rec-center program-listing SPAs, aggregators) are separate issues (I23/I24) and plug into the same DiscoverySource interface. The two out-of-metro entries at the end exist to demonstrate the Denver-metro boundary filter (AC1).
query: curated Denver-metro rec-center / municipal / school-district program-provider seed v1

candidates.name: Cherry Creek School District Community Education
Colorado Springs Parks, Recreation & Cultural Services
